text: polos 'eved yeshu'a hamashicha meqora liheyot shalicha venivedal livesorat elohim
asher hiveticha otah merosh 'al-yedey neviayv bekhitevey haqodesh
'al-devar beno asher mizera' david lefi habasar
asher hukhan leven-haelohim bigevura lefi rucha haqedusha bitechiyato mibeyn hametim hu yeshu'a hamashicha adoneynu
asher-'al-yado nitan lanu chesed ushelichut lehaqim mishema'at haemuna bekhal-hagoyim lema'an shemo
vevetokham hinekhem gam-atem qeruey yeshu'a hamashicha
kal-yedidey haelohim umeqoraim liheyot qedoshim asher beromi chesed veshalom lakhem meet haelohim avinu vaadoneynu yeshu'a hamashicha
barishona mode ani lelohay beyeshu'a hamashicha 'al-kulekhem asher emunatekhem muda'at bekhal-ha'olam
ki 'ed haelohim asher ani 'oved oto beruchi bivesorat beno ki tamid ani mazekir etekhem
umitechanen ani bekhal-'et bitefilotay asher atselicha lavo aleykhem raq-hapa'am bechefets haelohim
ki khaleta nafeshi lireotekhem ulehaatsil aleykhem matat rucha lema'an chazeq libekhem
lehitenachem 'imakhem ani veemunatekhem veatem beemunati
velo-akhached mikem achay ki-fe'amim rabot sameti 'al-libi lavo aleykhem liheyot li feri gam-bakhem kemo beyeter hagoyim velo-'aleta beyadi 'ad-hena
mechuyav anokhi layevanim velal'azim gam lachakhamim velapetaim
lakhen nedavani libi lehashemi'a et-habesora gam-etekhem beney romi
ki eyneni vosh mibesorat hamashicha asher gevurat elohim hi liteshu'a lekhal-hamaamin layehudi rishona vegam-layevani
ki-vah nigeleta tsideqat elohim meemuna el-emuna kakatuv vetsadiq beemunato yicheye
ki nigela charon elohim min-hashamayim 'al kal-rishe'at beney adam ve'avelatam asher ya'atseru et-haemet be'avela
ya'an asher da'at haelohim geluya veqirebam ki haelohim gila lahem
ki mahuto hana'alama hi kocho tivada' bema'asayv veterae vahem gevurato hanitsechit velahuto me'et nivera ha'olam 'ad-asher eyn lahem pitechon pe lehitenatsel
ki hikiru et-haelohim velo-khibeduhu khelohim vegam-lo hodu lo ki im-halekhu acharey hahevel bemo'atsoteyhem vayecheshakh libam hanive'ar
uveameram chakhamim anachenu hayu likhesilim
vayamiru et-kevod haelohim asher hu chay veqayam bidemut tselem adam asher hu khale veholekh tselem kal-'of veholekh 'al-areba' veremes haadama
'al-ken gam-haelohim netanam latumea betaaot libam lenabel gevioteyhem ish bere'ehu
asher hemiru amito shel haelohim bashaqer vayekhabedu et-haberiya le'avedah tachat boreah hamevorakh le'olamim amen
ba'avur zot netanam haelohim letaaot busha ki-nesheyhem hechelifu et-derekh erets beshel kederekh arets
vekhen gam-hazekharim 'azevu derekh gever beisha vayechamu ze vaze betaavatam vaya'asu to'eva zakhar 'im-zakhar vayiqechu sekhar meshuvatam harauy lahem be'etsem gufam
vekhaasher maasu da'at elohim netanam haelohim bidey de'a nimeasa la'asot et asher-lo ye'ase
vayirev beqirebam kal-chamas zenut varesha' betsa' vaaven vayimaleu qinea varetsach umeriva umirema vetahepukhot
holekhey rakhil umaleshinim sneey elohim vegeim vezedim umiteholalim vechshevey aven velo shome'im beqol avotam
nive'arim mida'at uvogedim akhezarim noterey sinea velo rachamanim
yode'im hema et-mishepat elohim ki-'osey ele beney-mavet hem velo levad sheya'asu et-ele ki gam-rotsim be'oseyhem
lakhen kal-ben-haadam hadan eyn lekha hitenatselut ki vadavar asher tadin et-chaverekha techayev nafeshekha baasher ata hadan ta'ase khema'asehu
veyada'enu ki-mishepat elohim mishepat emet 'al-'osey ele
veata ven-adam hadan et asher-pa'alu khaele veata 'ose khema'aseyhem hatomar lehimalet mimishepat haelohim
o tavuz lerov tuvo ulechemelato uleorekh rucho velo teda' ki-tovat haelohim mevia otekha lidey teshuva
uviqeshi levavekha hamemaen lashuv titsebor lekha 'evera leyom 'everat haelohim vehigalot mishepat tsideqo
asher yeshalem leish kema'asehu
chayey 'olam lashoqedim la'asot hatov veshocharey khavod vehadar asher eynenu 'over
ve'al-beney hameri vaasher lo-shame'u laemet ki im shame'u-la'avela 'aleyhem charon-af vechema
tsara umetsuqa 'al-kal-nefesh adam 'ose hara' 'al-hayehudi vatechila vegam-'al-hayevani
vekhavod vehadar veshalom lekhal-'ose hatov layehudi vatechila vegam layevani
ki eyn mas fanim 'im-haelohim
ki khal-asher chateu veeyn lahem tora gam biveli-tora yovedu vaasher chateu velahem tora 'al-pi hatora yishafetu
ki lo shome'ey hatora tsadiqim lifeney haelohim ki im-'osey hatora hem yitsedaqu
ki hagoyim asher eyn-lahem tora ba'asotam kediverey hatora mealeyhem gam-beeyn tora hem tora lenafesham
behareotam ma'ase hatora katuv 'al-libam veda'etam me'ida vahem umacheshevotam beqirebam mechayevot zot et-zot o mezakot
beyom asher yishepot haelohim et-kal-ta'alumot beney haadam beyad yeshu'a hamashicha kefi vesorati
hen ata niqera beshem yehudi venishe'aneta 'al-hatora vetitehalel belohim
veyada'eta et-retsono vetavin beyn-tov lara' behasekilekha vatora
uvatacheta venafeshekha liheyot molikh ha'iverim veor laasher bachshekh
omen lechaserey lev umore hapetaim veyesh lekha tsurat hamada' vehaemet batora
veata hatore acherim venafeshekha lo tore hatomar lo tigenov vehinekha gonev
hatomar lo tineaf veata noef teshaqets et-haelilim veata gozel et-haqodashim
titehalel batora vatenabel et-haelohim be'averekha et-hatora
ki vigelalekhem shem haelohim mechulal bagoyim kakatuv
hen hamila to'il im-tishemor et-hatora aval im-'over ata et-hatora milatekha hayetah-lekha le'arela
veim-yishemor he'arel et-mishepetey hatora halo techashev-lo 'arelato lemila
vehe'arel mileda hameqayem et-hatora hu yishepot otekha asher-lekha haketav vehamila ve'avareta et-hatora
ki lo-hametsuyan lemaree 'eynayim hu hayehudi velo haot hanirea vabasar hi hamila
ki im-tokho shel adam hu yehudi umila hi balev kefi harucha velo kefi haketav asher-lo mibeney adam tehilato ki im-meet haelohim
im ken mah-hu yiteron hayehudi umah-hi to'elet hamila
harebe mikal-panim techilato shebeyadam hafeqedu diverey elohim
veim-miqetsatam lo heeminu mah-bekhakh hayevatel cheseron emunatam et-emunat elohim
chalila aval hael hu haneeman vekhal-haadam kozev kakatuv lema'an titsedaq bidevarekha tizeke veshafetekha
veim-'avelatenu todi'a et-tsideqat haelohim mah-nomar hayesh-'avel belohim hameshalecha charon apo kedaber beney-adam ani medaber
chalila sheim-ken eykh yishepot haelohim et-ha'olam
ki im-bekhazevi tirebe vetiferots amito shel elohim litehila lo lama eshafet 'od kechote
velama lo na'ase kidevar mecharafeynu umotsiey diba 'aleynu keilu omerim anachenu na'ase hara' lema'an yavo hatov ele hem asher 'aleyhem yavo dinam betsedeq
ve'ata ma hayesh-lanu ma'ala yetera lo vimeuma kevar hokhachenu shegam-hayehudim gam-hayevanim kulam tachat hachete
kakatuv eyn tsadiq eyn gam-echad
eyn masekil eyn-doresh et-elohim
hakol sar yachedav neelachu eyn 'oseh-tov eyn gam-echad
qever patucha geronam leshonam yachaliqun chamat 'akheshuv tachat sefateymo
asher ala pihem male umerorot
rageleyhem yemaharu lishepakhe-dam
shod vashever bimesilotam
vederekh shalom lo yada'u
eyn pachad elohim leneged 'eyneyhem
vaanachenu yada'enu ki khal-mah-sheamera hatora medaberet laele she'ol hatora 'aleyhem kedey sheyisakher kal-pe vihi khal-ha'olam chayav lifeney elohim
mipeney shemima'asey hatora lo-yitsedaq lefanayv kal-basar ki 'al-yedey hatora da'at hachete
ve'ata biveli tora tsideqat elohim yatsea laor asher he'idu 'aleyha hatora vehaneviim
vehi tsideqat elohim beemunat yeshu'a hamashicha el-kol ve'al-kol asher heeminu vo ki eyn lehavedil
ki-khulam chatau vechaserey-khevod elohim hema
venitsedequ chinam bechasedo 'al-yedey hapedut asher hayeta bamashicha yeshu'a
asher samo haelohim lefaneynu lekhaporet 'al-yedey haemuna bedamo lehareot et-tsideqato acharey asher he'evir et-hachataim harishonim be'et chemelato
lehareot et-tsideqato ba'et hazot ki tsadiq hu umatsediq et-ben-emunat yeshu'a
uvekhen aye tehilat hamitehalel halo avada ve'al-yedey eyzu tora ha'al-yedey-torat hama'asim lo ki 'al-yedey torat haemuna
lakhen danim anachenu shebeemuna yitsedaq haadam biveli ma'asey tora
o haraq elohey hayehudim haelohim halo gam elohey hagoyim akhen gam-elohey hagoyim hu
ki echad haelohim hamatsediq et-hamulim mitokh haemuna veet-ha'arelim 'al-yedey haemuna
hamevatelim efo anachenu et-hatora 'al-yedey haemuna chalila akh meqayemim anachenu et-hatora
umah-nomar efo 'al-averaham avinu mah-ze hisig lefi habasar
ki im-nitsedaq averaham mitokh hama'asim lo hatehila aval lo lifeney haelohim
ki ma amar hakatuv veheemin averaham bayho vayachesheveha lo tsedaqa
hine hapo'el lo-yechashev lo sekharo lefi hechased ki im-lefi hachova
aval laasher eynenu fo'el ki im-maamin bamatsediq et-harasha' emunato techashev lo litsedaqa
kaasher gam-david measher et-haadam asher haelohim yacheshav-lo tsedaqa belo ma'asim beamero
asherey nesuy-pesha' kesuy chataa
asherey adam lo-yacheshov yeho lo 'aon
uvekhen haishur haze ha'al-hamila hu o-gam 'al-ha'arela halo amarenu ki leaveraham nechesheva emunato litsedaqa
veeymatay necheshevah-lo biheyoto nimol o be'odenu 'arel hen lo biheyoto nimol ki im be'odenu 'arel
veot hamila nitan lo lechotam tsideqat haemuna asher hayetah-lo vehu 'arel liheyot leav lekhal-asher yaaminu vehem 'arelim lema'an techashev hatsedaqa af-lahem
veliheyot leav gam-lamulim akhe-lo laasher eynam ela nimolim ki im-gam-holekhim be'iqevot haemuna shehayetah-lo leaveraham avinu be'odenu 'arel
ki lo 'al-yedey tora hayeta hahavetacha leaveraham o lezare'o liheyot yoresh ha'olam ki im-'al-yedey tsideqat haemuna
ki ilu hayeta hayerusha liveney-hatora haemuna tiheye lariq vehahavetacha betela
ya'an asher hatora mevia qatsef ki beeyn tora eyn 'avera
'al-ken meemuna lema'an tiheye lefi-chesed ba'avur asher tikon hahavetacha lekhal hazara' lo liveney hatora levadam ki-gam liveney emunat averaham asher hu av lekhulanu
kakatuv ki av-hamon goyim netatikha vehu heemin ki neged panayv elohim hamechaye et-hametim vehaqore lemah-shelo-haya kemo ho
beefes tiqeva heemin betiqeva lema'an asher yiheye leav hamon goyim kemo sheneemar ko yiheye zare'ekha
velo rafeta emunato behitebonano el-besaro asher haya khamet biheyoto keven-meat shana veel-rechem sara asher bala
velo-chalaq libo behavetachat haelohim kimechusar emuna ki im-hitechazeq beemunato vayiten kavod lelohim
venafesho yoda'at meod ki et-asher hiveticha gam-yakhol la'asoto
'al-ken gam-necheshevah-lo litsedaqa
velo-lema'ano levad katuv hadavar haze shenechesheva lo
ki im-gam lema'anenu asher 'atida lehechashev lanu hamaaminim bemi shehe'ir et-yeshu'a adoneynu min-hametim
asher nimesar ba'avur pesha'eynu vene'or leva'avur tsadeqenu
lakhen acharey nitsedaqenu vaemuna shalom lanu 'im-haelohim baadoneynu yeshu'a hamashicha
asher beyado matsanu vaemuna gam-mevo hachesed haze asher anachenu 'omedim bo venitehalel betiqevat kevod haelohim
velo-'od ela shenitehalel batsarot mipeney sheyada'enu ki-hatsara mevia lidey savelanut
vesavelanut lidey 'amida venisayon va'amida venisayon lidey tiqeva
vetiqeva hi lo tavish ki hutseqa bilevavenu ahavat elohim 'al-yedey rucha haqodesh hanitan lanu
ki hamashicha be'odenu chalashim met be'ito be'ad haresha'im
lo vimehera yamut ish be'ad hatsadiq aval efeshar sheyisaehu libo lamut be'ad hatov
uvazot hodi'a haelohim et-ahavato eleynu asher mashicha met ba'adenu vaanachenu 'od chataim
ve'ata asher nitsedaqenu bedamo 'al achat kama vekhama shenivasha' bo min-haqatsef
ki hine huretsinu lelohim bemot beno biheyotenu oyevim af ki-nivasha' 'ata bechayayv acharey asher huretsinu
velo-'od ela shemitehalalim anachenu belohim 'al-yad adoneynu yeshu'a hamashicha asher bo 'ata haya lanu haritsuy
lakhen kaasher 'al-yedey adam echad ba hachete la'olam vehamavet be'eqev hachete vekhen 'avar hamavet 'al-kal-beney adam mipeney asher kulam chatau
ki lifeney matan tora kevar haya chete ba'olam ela shel yechashev chete beeyn tora
af 'al-pi khen mashal hamavet meadam 'ad-mshe gam 'al-otam shel chateu kefishe'o shel-adam harishon asher bidemuto hu he'atid lavo
aval lo khapesha' hamatana ki hine befesha' haechad metu harabim af ki-chesed elohim umatenato rabu larabim bechesed haadam haechad yeshu'a hamashicha
veeyn hamatana kadavar shehaya 'al-yedey echad shechata ki hadin ba meechad lechayev umatenat hachesed hi lezakot mipesha'im rabim
ki im-befesha' haechad malakh hamavet 'al-yedey haechad af ki-meqabeley shife'at hachesed umatenat hatsedaqa yimelekhu vachayim 'al-yedey haechad yeshu'a hamashicha
lakhen kaasher befesha' echad neeshemu kal-beney-adam ken bizekhut achat yizeku khal-beney-adam lachayim
ki kaasher bimeri haadam haechad hayu harabim lechataim ken bemishema'at haechad yiheyu harabim letsadiqim
vehatora nikhenesa lema'an yirebe hapasha' uvaasher rava hachete 'adaf 'alayv hechased
lema'an yimelokh hachesed 'al-yedey hatsedaqa lechayey 'olam beyeshu'a hamashicha adoneynu kaasher malakh hachete bamavet 'ad-hena
im-ken mah-nomar hana'amod bachete lema'an yirebe hechased
chalila lanu ki matenu lachete veeykh nosif licheyot bo
o haeynekhem yode'im ki khulanu hanitebalim lamashicha yeshu'a lemoto nitebalenu
lakhen niqebarenu 'imo batevila lamavet lema'an nitehalekh bechayim mechudashim kaasher hamashicha ne'or min-hametim 'al-yedey kevod haav
ki im-nidebaqenu bedimeyon moto akhen devuqim niheye gam-litechiyato
baasher yode'im anachenu ki-nitselav 'imo haadam hayashan asher banu lema'an yovad guf hachete velo niheye 'od 'avadim lachete
ki hamet niqa min-hachete
vehine im-matenu 'im-hamashicha naamin ki-gam-nicheye 'imo
baasher yada'enu ki hamashicha acharey asher ne'or min-hametim lo yamut 'od velo yishelat-bo 'od hamavet
ki asher met met lachete pa'am echad vaasher chay chay hu lelohim
vekhen gam-atem heyu ve'eyneykhem kemetim lachete vechayim lelohim bamashicha yeshu'a adoneynu
im-ken efo al-tishelat hachatat begufekhem asher yamut lehatot levavekhem acharey taaotayv
veal-titenu et-evareykhem liheyot likheley-'avel lachete aval tenu 'atsemekhem lelohim kachayim me'im hametim veevareykhem likheley tsedaqa lelohim
ki hachete lo yisetarer 'od 'aleykhem mipeney sheeynekhem tachat hatora ki im-tachat hechased
ve'ata hanecheta mipeney sheeyn anachenu tachat hatora ki im-tachat hechased chalila
halo yeda'etem ki asher titenu nafeshekhem lo liheyot 'avadayv lasur lemishema'eto 'avadim atem lo lishemo'a beqolo im-lachete eley-mavet im-lamishema'at eley-tsedaqa
aval todot lelohim ki-heyitem 'avedey hachete veachar shema'etem bekhal-levavekhem letsurat haleqach asher chunakhetem bah
shuchararetem midey hachete lakhen hisheta'ebadetem latsedaqa

kederekh beney-adam ani medaber mipeney vesarekhem hechalush ki kaasher lefanim hakhinotem et-evareykhem la'avodat hatumea veharesha' lehareshi'a ken 'ata hakhinu et-evareykhem la'avodat hatsedaqa lehiteqadesh
ki-ve'et heyotekhem 'avedey hachete chafeshim heyitem min-hatsedaqa
uma efo haperi shehaya lakhem az min-hama'asim asher 'ata tevshu mehem ki acharitam hamavet
akhen 'ata biheyotekhem meshuchararim midey hachete umeshu'ebadim lelohim yesh lakhem pereyekhem liqedusha veacharito chayey 'olam
ki-sekhar hachete hu hamavet umatenat chesed elohim hi chayey ha'olamim bamashicha yeshu'a adoneynu
o halo yeda'etem echay ki leyode'ey hatora ani medaber ki hatora tishelat 'al-haadam kal-yemey chayayv
ki eshet ish min hatora zequqa leva'elah bechayayv uvemot ba'elah petura hi midin ba'elah
ve'al-ken im-tiheye leish acher beechayey va'elah noefet yiqare lah uvemot ba'elah chafeshit hi min-hatora veeynena noefet biheyotah leish acher
vekhen achay gam-atem heyitem kametim latora bigeviyat hamashicha liheyot leacher laasher ne'or min-hametim lema'an na'aseh-peri lelohim
ki be'et heyotenu vabasar teshuqot hachataim asher hite'oraru 'al-yedey hatora hayu fo'alot beevareynu la'asot peri lamavet
aval 'ata peturim anachenu min-hatora ki matenu laasher hayinu zequqim lo lema'an na'avod me'ata lefi chidush harucha velo lefi-yshen haketav
im-ken hanomar shehatora chete hi chalila ela lo yada'eti et-hachete bileti 'al-yedey hatora ki lo-hayiti yode'a hachimud luley amera hatora lo tachemod
vehachete matsa lo siba vamitseva le'orer beqirebi kal-chimud ki mibale'adey hatora hachete met hu
vaani hayiti chay milefanim belo tora ukheshebaa hamitseva vayechi hachete
vaani mati venimetsa shehamitseva asher nitena lachayim hayeta li lamavet
ki-matsa hachete siba vamitseva lehate'ot oti vayemiteni 'al-yadah
uvekhen hatora hi qedosha vehamitseva qedosha vishara vetova
hakhi hatova hayetah-li lamavet chalila ela hachete kedey sheyerae hachete bahavio li hamavet min-hatova kedey sheyiheye hachete lachataa yetera 'al-yedey hamitseva
ki yode'im anachenu shehatora ruchanit vaani vasar venimekar beyad-hachete
ki et-asher ani fo'el lo yada'eti ki eyneni 'ose et asher-ani rotse bo ki im-asher saneti oto ani 'ose
uva'asoti et asher lo-ratsiti hineni mode ki hatora tova hi
ve'ata lo-ani 'od hapo'el oto ki im-hachete hashokhen beqirebi
ki yada'eti asher-bi bivesari lo yishekon tov ki rotse ani la'asot hatov velo emetsa
ki eyneni 'ose hatov asher-ani rotse ki im-hara' asher eyneni rotse oto ani 'ose
veim et-asher lo-ratsiti ani 'ose lo-'od ani hapo'el ki im-hachete hashokhen beqirebi
uvekhen motse-ani vi ze hachoq anokhi rotse la'asot hatov vedavaq-bi hara'
ki lefi haadam hapenimi chafatseti betorat elohim
aval roeh-ani veevaray choq acher halchem lechaq-sikheli veyolikheni shevi letorat hachete asher beevaray
oy-li haadam he'ani mi yatsileni miguf hamavet haze
avarekha et-haelohim beyeshu'a hamashicha adoneynu
uvekhen besikheli hineni 'eved letorat haelohim uvivesari ani 'eved letorat hachete
'al-ken 'ata eyn-ashema vaele asher hem bamashicha yeshu'a hamitehalekhim shel khabasar ela lefi harucha
ki torat rucha hachayim asher bamashicha yeshu'a hotsia oti lachafeshi mitorat hachete vehamavet
ki mah-shel yakhela hatora la'asot mipeney shenechelash kochah 'al-yedey habasar oto 'asa haelohim beshalecho et-beno bedimeyon besar hachete uve'ad hachete vayareshi'a et-hachete babasar
kedey shetequyam tsideqat hatora banu haholekhim lo-khederekh habasar ki im-lefi harucha
ki beney habasar yehegu bediverey habasar uveney harucha bediverey harucha
ki-machashevet habasar hi hamavet umachashevet harucha hi hachayim vehashalom
mipeney shemachashevet habasar raq sineat elohim hi baasher lo tisheta'ebed letorat haelohim veaf lo tukhal
kal-asher babasar yesodam lo yukhelu liheyot retsuyim lelohim
veatem eynekhem babasar ki im-barucha im-amenam rucha haelohim shokhen beqirebekhem ki mi sheeyn-bo rucha hamashicha hu eynenu shelo
veim-hamashicha beqirebekhem haguf met bigelal hachete veharucha chayim bigelal hatsedaqa
veim-yishekon beqirebekhem rucho shel hame'ir et-yeshu'a min-hametim hame'ir et-hamashicha min-hametim hu gam et-gevioteykhem hametot yechaye 'al-yedey rucho hashokhen beqirebekhem
lakhen achay chayavim anachenu lo labasar licheyot lefi habasar
ki im-ticheyu lefi habasar mot temutun veim-'al-yedey harucha tamitu et-ma'aleley habasar chayo ticheyu
ki-khol asher rucha elohim yenahagem beney elohim hema
ki lo qibaletem rucha 'avedut lashuv liro ki im-qibaletem rucha mishepat banim asher bo qoreim anachenu aba avinu
veharucha hahu me'id beruchenu ki-veney elohim anachenu
veim-banim anachenu gam-yoreshim niheye yoreshey nachalat elohim vechaverey hamashicha birusha im-nite'ane ito lema'an gam-ito nekhubad
ki omer ani she'inuyey hazeman haze eynam shequlim keneged hakavod haba lehigalot 'aleynu
ki haberia ta'arog utetsape lamo'ed asher yitegalu beney haelohim
ki-nikhene'a haberia lahevel lo meretsonah ki im-lema'an hamakheni'a otah velo beeyn tiqeva
ki haberia gam-hi tetse me'avedut hakilayon el-cherut kevod beney haelohim
ki yada'enu asher haberia khulah teanach vetachil 'ad-hena
velo-'od ela shegam-anachenu af 'al pi sheyesh-lanu bikurey harucha neanach benafeshenu unechake lemishepat habanim lifedut geviyatenu
ki nosha'enu vatiqeva aval hatiqeva hanirea la'eynayim eynena tiqeva ki eykh yeyachel ish ladavar asher-hu roe
ela im-neqave lemah-shel reinuhu nechake lo venochil
vekhen gam-harucha tomekh otanu bechuleshuteynu ki lo yada'enu lehitepalel karauy akhen harucha hu mafegi'a ba'adenu baanachot 'amuqot midaber
vehachoqer levavot yode'a et-macheshevot harucha ki kiretson haelohim yafegi'a be'ad haqedoshim
vehine yada'enu ki ohavey elohim haqeruim ba'atsato hakol ya'azor letov lahem
ki et asher yeda'am miqedem otam gam-ya'ad liheyot domim letselem beno lema'an yiheye habekhor betokh achim rabim
veet asher-ya'ad miqedem otam gam-qara veet-asher qara otam gam-hitsediq veet asher hitsediq otam gam peer
ve'ata mah-nomar 'al-zot im-haelohim lanu mi yariv itanu
asher-'al-beno shelo lo chas ki im-netano be'ad kulanu halo yiten lanu 'imo et-hakol
mi ya'ane bivechirey elohim hen elohim hu hamatsediq
umi-hu yaashimem hen hamashicha asher met vaasher ne'or me'im hametim hu mimin haelohim vehu yafegi'a ba'adenu
mi yaferidenu meahavat haelohim hatsara o metsuqa o masetema o ra'av im-'ereya o sakana o-charev
kakatuv ki-'aleykha horagenu khal-hayom necheshavenu ketson tivecha
aval bekhal-ele gavarenu meod 'al-yedey haohev otanu
uvatucha ani shel hamavet velo hachayim lo maleakhim velo serarot velo gevurot lo haho velo he'atid
lo harom velo ha'omeq velo khal-beriya yukhelu lehaferidenu meahavat haelohim asher hi bamashicha yeshu'a adoneynu
emet ani medaber bamashicha velo ashaqer veda'eti me'ida li berucha haqodesh
ki-gadol 'itsevoni veeyn-qets ledaavon libi
ki mi-yiten heyoti ani lecherem min-hamashicha be'ad achay sheeri uvesari
asher hem beney yiserael velahem mishepat habanim vehakavod vehaberitot umatan hatora veha'avoda vehahavetachot
velahem haavot umehem yatsa hamashicha lefi vesaro asher-hu elohim 'al-hakol mevorakh le'olamim amen
aval lo shenafal devar elohim aretsa ki lo-khol asher miyiserael yiserael hema
velo mipeney shehem zera' averaham kulam banim ki veyitsechaq yiqare lekha zara'
kelomar lo veney-habasar hema beney haelohim ki im-beney hahavetacha hem hanecheshavim lezara'
ki-devar hahavetacha hu mah-sheneemar lamo'ed ashuv ulesara ven
velo-'od ela shehaya gam-beriveqa vehi hara leechad leyitsechaq avinu
ki beterem yuledu vaneyha ve'od lo-'asu tov o-ra' lema'an taqum 'atsat haelohim kefi vechirato lo mitokh ma'asim ki im-kiretson haqore
neemar lah ki-rav ya'avod tsa'ir
kakatuv vaohav et-ya'aqov veet-'esav saneti
im-ken hanomar sheyesh-'avel belohim chalila
ki lemshe amar vechanoti et-asher achon verichameti et-asher arachem
ve'al-ken eyn hadavar lo-veyad harotse velo-veyad harats ki im-beyad haelohim hamerachem
ki-khen hakatuv omer lefare'o ba'avur zot he'emadetikha ba'avur hareotekha et-kochi ulema'an saper shemi bekhal-haarets
veyivada' baze shemi sheyachepots yechunenu umi sheyachepots yaqeshe libo
veim tomar lamah-ze yifeqod 'aon ki neged retsono mi yiteyatsav
aval ben-adam mi ata ki tariv et-haelohim hayomar yetser leyotsero madu'a kakha 'asitani
im-eyn reshut layotser 'al-hachomer la'asot hagolem haechad keli khavod o keli qalon
uma efo im-haelohim hechafets lehareot za'emo ulehodi'a gevurato nasa bekhal-orekh rucho et-keley haza'am hanekhonim laavadon
lehodi'a gam-et-'sher kevodo bikheley hachanina asher hekhin lekhavod
vehem anachenu asher qeraanu lo min-hayehudim levadam ki af min-hagoyim
keamero vehoshe'a eqera lelo-'ami 'ami ulelo-ruchama ruchama
vehaya bimeqom asher-yeamer lahem lo-'ami atem yeamer lahem beney el-chay
visha'eyahu qore 'al-yiserael ki im-yiheye misepar beney yiserael kechol hayam shear yashuv bo kilayon charuts shotef tsedaqa
ki khala venecheratsa adonay 'ose beqerev haarets
vekhaasher amar yesha'eyahu lifeney mize luley yeho tsevaot hotir lanu sarid kime'at kisedom hayinu la'amora daminu
ve'ata hanomar shehagoyim asher lo radefu acharey hatsedaqa hisigu et-hatsedaqa hi hatsedaqa asher mitokh haemuna
veyiserael beradefo torat tsedaqa letorat hatsedaqa lo higi'a
ve'al-ma 'al-asher-lo meemuna derashuha ki im-mima'asim ki hitenagefu beeven nagef
kakatuv hineni yisad betsion even negef vetsur mikheshol vekhal-hamaamin bo lo yevosh
echay chefets levavi utefilati lelohim be'ad yiserael asher yivashe'u
ki me'id ani 'aleyhem shemeqaneim lelohim aval lo-veda'at
ki et-tsideqat elohim lo yada'u vayevaqeshu lehaqim et-tsideqatam uletsideqat elohim lo nikhena'u
ki hamashicha sof hatora litsedaqa lekhal-hamaamin bo
ki-mshe katav 'al-devar hatsedaqa mitokh hatora asher ya'ase otam haadam vachay bahem
vehatsedaqa asher mitokh haemuna omeret al-tomar bilevavekha mi-ya'ale hashamayema lehorid et-hamashicha
o mi yered litehom leha'alot et-hamashicha min-hametim
aval mah-tomar qarov eleykha hadavar befikha uvilevavekha hu devar haemuna asher anachenu mevaserim
ki im-befikha tode sheyeshu'a hu haadon vetaamin bilevavekha shehaelohim he'iro min-hametim tivashe'a
ki vilevavo yaamin haadam vehayeta lo litsedaqa uvefihu yode vehayetah-lo lishu'a
ki hakatuv omer kal-hamaamin bo lo yevosh
veeyn haferesh beyn hayehudi layevani ki adon echad lekhulam vehu 'ashir lekhal-qoreayv
ki-khol asher-yiqera beshem yeho yimalet
ve'ata eykh yiqereu el-asher lo-heeminu vo veeykh yaaminu bemi shel shame'u et-shime'o veeykh yisheme'u veeyn magid
veeykh yagidu ki im-sheluchim kakatuv mah-navu rageley mevaser shalom mevaser tov
aval lo-khulam shame'u leqol habesora ki yesha'eyahu amar yeho mi heemin lishemu'atenu
im-ken haemuna vaa mitokh hashemu'a vehashemu'a 'al-yedey devar-hamashicha
veomar hakhi lo shame'u amenam bekhal-haarets yatsa qavam uviqetse tevel mileyhem
veomar hakhi yiserael lo yada' hineh-khevar mshe amar ani aqeniakhem belo-'am begoy naval akhe'isekhem
visha'eyahu melao libo lemor nimetseti lelo viqeshuni niderasheti lelo shaalu
ve'al-yiserael hu omer peraseti yaday kal-hayom el-'am sorer umore
uvekhen omer ani hazanach haelohim et-'amo chalila ki gam-anokhi yisereeli mizera' averaham lemate vineyamin
lo-zanach haelohim et-'amo asher yeda'o miqedem halo tede'u et-asher hakatuv omer beeliyahu vehu tso'eq el-haelohim 'al-yiserael lemor
yeho et-nevieykha haregu veet-mizebechoteykha harasu vaivater ani levadi vayevaqeshu et-nafeshi
umeh-'ana oto devar elohim hisheareti li shive'at alafim ish asher lo-khare'u laba'al
vekhen gam-beyameynu nisheara sheerit kivechirat hechased
veim 'al-yedey hachesed lo hayeta mitokh hama'asim ki im-ken hachesed eynenu-'od chased veim-hayeta mitokh hama'asim eynenu-'od chesed ki im-ken hama'ase yechedal liheyot ma'ase
ve'ata mah-hu et asher-biqesh yiserael lo hisig raq hanivecharim hem hisigu vehaacherim hisheminu levavam
kakatuv natan lahem haelohim rucha taredema 'eynayim lo lireot veazenayim lo lishemo'a 'ad-hayom haze
vedavid omer yehi shulechanam lefach ulereshet ulemoqesh uleshilumim lahem
techeshakhena 'eyneyhem mereot umateneyhem tamid hame'ad
ve'ata ani omer hanikheshelu lema'an yipolu chalila ki vefishe'am baa hayeshu'a lagoyim lema'an haqeniam
veim-pishe'am haya le'sher ha'olam venizeqam le'sher hagoyim meloam 'al-achat kama vekhama
vaaleykhem hagoyim ani medaber ukhefi heyoti shalicha lagoyim et-sheruti akhabed
ulay ukhal lehaqeni et beney-'ami ulehoshi'a miqetsatam
ki im-dechiyatam ritsuy la'olam mah-efo tiheye asefatam halo chayim min-hametim
veim-hateruma qodesh ha'isa qodesh kamoha veim-hashoresh qodesh ha'anafim qodesh kamohu
vekhi niqefu miqetsat ha'anafim veata zeyt haya'ar hurekaveta tacheteyhem venitechabareta leshoresh hazayit uledisheno
al-titepaer 'al-ha'anafim veim-titepaer da' shaata lo tisa et-hashoresh ki im-hashoresh nose otakh
vekhi tomar halo niqefu ha'anafim lema'an urekav ani
ken hadavar hema niqefu 'al-asher lo heeminu veata hinekha qayam 'al-yedey haemuna al-titegae ki im-yera
ki hine haelohim lo-chas 'al-ha'anafim hanoladim min-ha'ets veulay lo-yachus gam-'aleykha
lakhen reeh-na tovat elohim veza'emo za'emo 'al-hanofelim ve'aleykha tovato im-ta'amod betovato veim-ayin gam-ata tikaret
vegam-hema im-lo ya'amedu bemireyam yurekavu ki-yakhol haelohim lashuv leharekivam
hen ata nigezareta me'ets asher betive'o zeyt ya'ar vehurekaveta shel kheteva' bezayit tov 'al-achat kama vekhama sheyurekevu ele khetive'am bazayit asher yatseu mimenu
ki lo-akhached mikem achay et-hasod haze pen-tiheyu chakhamim be'eyneykhem sheyiserael ba lidey timetum halev lemiqetsato 'ad ki-yikanes melo hagoyim
vekhen kal-yiserael yivashe'a kakatuv uva letsion goel veyashiv pesha' miya'aqov
vezot beriti asher ekherot itam ki eselach la'aonam
hen bidevar habesora oyevim hem bigelalekhem uvidevar habechira chavivim hem bigelal haavot
ki lo-yinachem haelohim 'al-matenotayv velo 'al-qeriato
ki kaasher gam-atem milefanim mamerim heyitem et-pi elohim ve'ata huchanetem bemireyam shel-ele
ken gam-ele 'ata mamerim lema'an yuchanu gam-hem 'al-yedey chaninatekhem
ki-haelohim hisegir et-kulam lameri lema'an yachon et-kulam
meh-'amoq 'sher chakhemat elohim ve'sher da'eto mishepatayv mi yacheqor uderakhayv mi yimetsa
ki mi-tiken et-rucha yeho veish 'atsato yodi'enu
o mi hiqedim oto vedavar vishulam lo
halo mimenu hakol ve'al-yado hakol veelayv hakol velo hakavod le'olamim amen
ve'ata hineni me'orer etekhem achay berachamey elohim asher tagishu et-gevioteykhem qareban chay veqadosh veniretse lelohim vehayeta zot 'avodatekhem hasikhelit
veal-tidamu la'olam haze ki im-hitechalefu liheyot lakhem lev chadash livechon mah-hu retson haelohim hatov vehanechemad vehashalem
ki 'al-pi hachesed hanitan li omer ani lekhal-ish bakhem levileti rum-levavo lema'ela min-harauy ki im-yehi tsanu'a bemacheshevotayv kemidat haemuna asher-chalaq lo haelohim
ki kaasher beguf echad yesh-lanu evarim harebe velo khal-haevarim yeshameshu shimush echad
ken anachenu harabim guf echad bamashicha vekhal-echad veechad mimenu evar lachavero
veyesh-lanu matanot shonot kachesed hanitan lanu im-nevua hi tehi kemidat haemuna
veim-shimush leish ya'asoq beshimusho veim-more behoraato
veim-mokhicha betokhacheto hanoten ya'ase betam-levav vehamanehig bisheqida vehagomel chesed besever panim yafot
ahavatekhem tehi beli chanupa sineu et-hara' vedivequ vatov
ehevu et-acheykhem mechabevim ze et-ze haqedimu ish et-re'ehu linehog bo kavod
shiqedu veal-te'atselu hitelahavu varucha viheyu 'avadim laadon
simechu vatiqeva hochilu vatsara shiqedu 'al-hatefila
hitenadevu tsarekhey haqedoshim ridefu lehakhenis orechim
barakhu et-rodefeykhem barakhu veal-teqalelu
simechu 'im-hasemechim uvekhu 'im-habokhim
lev echad yehi lekhulekhem al-tehalekhu vigedolot ki im-hitenahagu 'im-hashefalim al-tiheyu chakhamim be'eyneykhem
al-teshalemu leish ra'a tachat ra'a direshu hatov be'eyney kal-adam
im-tukhelu kekhal-asher timetsa yedekhem yehi lakhem shalom 'im-kal-adam
al-tinaqemu naqam yediday ki im-tenu maqom lacharon-af ki khatuv li naqam veshilem amar yeho
lakhen im-ra'ev snaakha haakhilehu lechem veim-tsame hasheqehu mayim ki gechalim ata chote 'al-rosho
al-na yikhebashekha hara' kevosh ata et-hara' batov
kal-nefesh tikana' ligedulat harashuyot ki-eyn rashut ki im-meet haelohim veharashuyot hanimetsaot 'al-yad elohim nitemanu
lakhen kal-hamiteqomem larashut mamere et-pi haelohim vehamamerim yiseu et-'aonam
ki eyn pachad hashalitim 'al 'osey hatov ki im-'al 'osey hara' ve'al-ken im-retsonekha shel tira min-harashut 'ase hatov vehayah-lekha shevach meitah
ki mesharetet elohim hi letov lakh aval im-hara' ta'ase yera ki lo lechinam chagurat-cherev hi ki-mesharetet elohim hi leshalem gemul velishepokh chema 'al 'osey hara'
'al-ken 'aleynu lehikane'a lo va'avur haqetsef bilevad ki-gam mida'at chovatenu
'al-ken notenim atem et-hamas ki mesharatey elohim hem 'omedim lazot 'al mishemaretam
lakhen tenu lekhal-ish mah-sheatem chayavim lo hamas laasher-lo hamas vehamekhes laasher-lo hamekhes vehamora laasher-lo hamora vehakavod laasher-lo hakavod
veal-tiheyu chayavim leish davar zulati ahavat ish et-re'ehu ki haohev et-chavero qiyem et-hatora
ki mitseot lo tineaf lo tiretsach lo tigenov lo ta'ane 'ed sheqer lo tachemod 'im kal-mitseot acherot kulan hena bikhelal hamaamar haze veahaveta lere'akha kamokha
haahava lo tara' lare' 'al-ken haahava qium hatora khulah
vekhazot 'asu mipeney sheatem yode'im et-hasha'a ki-khevar 'et lehaqits min-hashena ki yeshu'atenu qerova 'ata mehayom asher banu lehaamin
halayela chalaf vehayom qarev lakhen nasirah-na et-ma'asey hachshekh venilebesha et-keley nesheq haor
ukhehitehalekh beor hayom nitehalekha bitseni'ut lo vezolalut uveshikaron velo begiluy 'arayot va'asot zima velo vimeriva veqinea
ki im-liveshu et-haadon yeshu'a hamashicha vedaagu livesarekhem akhe-lo lehagebir hataaot
veet-hechalush baemuna oto qabelu velo ladin et-hamachashavot
yesh maamin shemutar leekhol kal-davar vehechalush lo yokhal ki im-yaraq
haokhel al-yivez et-asher lo yokhel vaasher lo yokhal al-yadin et-haokhel ki-qibel oto haelohim
mi ata ki tadin 'eved sheeyno shelakh hen laadonayv hu im yaqum veim yipol aval yuqam ki-yakhol haelohim lahaqimo
yesh mavedil beyn-yom layom veyesh asher kal-hayamim domim be'eynayv yehi khal-ish nakhon beda'eto

hashomer et-hayom leqadesho shomer oto laadon vaasher eynenu shomer laadon eynenu shomer haokhel okhel leshem haadon ki mode hu lelohim vaasher eynenu okhel leshem haadon eynenu okhel umode hu lelohim
ki eyn-ish mimenu chay lenafesho veeyn ish met lenafesho
ki im-nicheye nicheye laadon veim namut namut laadon lakhen beyn chayim uveyn metim laadon hinenu
ki ba'avur zot met hamashicha vayaqam vayechi lema'an yiheye adon gam 'al-hametim gam 'al-hachayim
veata mah-lekha ki tadin et-achikha umah-lekha ki tavuz leachikha halo khulanu 'atidim la'amod lifeney khise din elohim
ki khatuv chay-ani neum-yeho ki li tikhera' kal-berekh vekhal-lashon tode lelohim
hine kal-echad mimenu 'al-nafesho yiten cheshebon lelohim
lakhen al-nadin 'od ish et-re'ehu ki im-ze yehi dinekhem shel-yiten ish lifeney achiv mikheshol o moqesh
ani yada'eti uvarur li hadavar baadon yeshu'a ki-eyn tame bifeney 'atsemo veraq-tame hu lemi sheyacheshevenu lo letame
veim-ye'atsev achikha 'al-devar maakhal eynekha holekh derekh achava al-na teabed beakhelekha et-asher ba'ado met hamashicha
lakhen hizaheru pen-yiheye tuvekhem legidufim
ki-malekhut haelohim eynena akhila ushetiya ki-tsedaqa hi veshalom vesimecha berucha haqodesh
veha'oved baele et-hamashicha ratsuy hu lelohim uvachun laanashim
ve'ata niredefah-na darekhey shalom vaasher nekhonen bo ish et-re'ehu
al-taharos et-ma'ase haelohim 'al-devar maakhal hen hakol tahor vera' hu laadam asher yokhalenu lemikheshol
tov shel-tokhal basar velo-tishete yayin velo-ta'ase davar asher yitenagef-bo achikha vehaya lo lemikheshol ulefuqa
im yesh lekha emuna tehi-lekha levadekha lifeney haelohim asherey ha'ose hakasher be'eynayv veeyn libo noqefo
vaasher safeq lo beakhelo neesham ki lo 'asa meemuna vekhal-hana'ase shel meemuna chete hu
vaanachenu hachazaqim 'aleynu laset chuleshot harafim veal-nevaqesh hanaat 'atsemenu
ki khal-echad mimenu yevaqesh hanaat chavero letov lo lema'an yitekonan
ki gam-hamashicha lo viqesh hanaat 'atsemo ela khakatuv cherepot chorefeykha nafelu 'alay
ki khal-asher nikhetav milefanim nikhetav lelamedenu lema'an tiheyeh-lanu tiqeva besavelanut uvetanechumot haketuvim
velohey hasavelanut vehanechama hu yiten viheyitem kulekhem lev echad kiretson hamashicha yeshu'a
asher tekhabedu benefesh achat uvefe echad et-haelohim avi adoneynu yeshu'a hamashicha
'al-ken qabelu-na ish et-achiv kaasher gam-hamashicha qibel otanu likhevod haelohim
vaani omer ki yeshu'a hamashicha nolad liheyot mesharet hanimolim lema'an amito shel haelohim leqayem et-hahavetachot asher laavot
vehagoyim hema yekhabedu et-haelohim lema'an rachamayv kakatuv 'al-ken odekha vagoyim uleshimekha azamera
veomer hareninu goyim 'amo
veomer halalu et-yeho kal-goyim shabechuhu kal-haumim
visha'eyahu omer vehaya shoresh yishay asher 'omed linesi 'amim elayv goyim yeqauu
velohey hatiqeva hu yemale etekhem kal-simecha veshalom baemuna lema'an te'edaf tiqevatekhem bigevurat rucha haqodesh
vehine achay muvetach ani bakhem ki meleey ahavat chesed atem umemulaim kal-da'at veyode'im lehokhicha ish et-re'ehu
af-'al-pi khen he'azeti me'at likhetov aleykhem hena vahena kemazekir etekhem 'al-pi hachesed hanatun li meet haelohim
liheyot mesharet yeshu'a hamashicha lagoyim ulekhahen bivesorat haelohim lema'an yiheye qareban hagoyim ratsuy umequdash berucha haqodesh
'al-ken yesh-li lehitehalel bamashicha yeshu'a be'ineyeney haelohim
ki lo-a'ez panay ledaber davar zulati asher 'asa hamashicha beyadi lema'an hatot beomer uvema'ase et-lev hagoyim lasur lemishema'eto
bigevurat otot umofetim uvigevurat rucha elohim 'ad-ki mirushalayim usevivoteyha ve'ad leiluriqon mileti et-besorat hamashicha
behishetadeli lehagid et-habesora lo bimeqomot asher-sham kevar niqera shem hamashicha shel evene 'al-yesod acherim
ela kakatuv asher lo-supar lahem rau vaasher lo-shame'u hitebonanu
vehu hadavar asher-bigelalo ne'etsareti pa'am ushetayim mibo aleykhem
aval 'ata sheeyn-li 'od maqom bagelilot haele vaani nikhesaf lavo aleykhem ze shanim rabot
avo aleykhem belekheti leisepameya ki meqave anokhi lireotekhem be'averi veatem teshalechuni shama veesebe'a me'at mikem barishona
amenam 'ata elekha yerushalayema la'azor laqedoshim
ki maqedoneya vaakhaya hoilu literom teruma leeveyoney haqedoshim asher birushalayim
ki hoilu veaf-mechuyavim hem lahem hine lagoyim haya cheleq bediverey harucha asher lahem vahalo 'aleyhem letamekham gam bediverey haguf
lakhen keshegamareti et-zot vechatameti lahem haperi haze az e'ebera derekh aretsekhem leisepameya
veyode'a anokhi ki bevoi aleykhem avo bimelo virekhatah shel-besorat hamashicha
vaani me'orer etekhem achay baadoneynu yeshu'a hamashicha uveahavat harucha lehitechazeq 'imi beha'etirekhem ba'adi el-haelohim
lema'an asher enatsel mehasorarim beerets yehuda veye'erav 'al-haqedoshim shimushi leshem yerushalayim
vaasher avo aleykhem besimecha biretson elohim veenafesh 'imakhem
velohey hashalom 'im-kulekhem amen
vehineni mazekir lakhem letov et-puvi achoteynu shehi meshameshet haqehila asher beqanekeray
asher teqabeluha baadoneynu karauy laqedoshim vetitemekhu vah lekhol asher-titsetarekh lakhem ki-gam-hi hayeta 'ozeret larabim vegam lenafeshi
shaalu lishelom periseqela va'aqilas shehem chaveray ba'avodat hamashicha yeshu'a
asher natenu et-tsavaram be'ad nafeshi velo-ani levadi ode lahem ki gam-kal-qehilot hagoyim vegam laqehila beveytam tishealu leshalom
shaalu lishelom apeynetos chavivi shehu reshit aseya lamashicha
shaalu lishelom mireyam she'amela 'amal rav ba'avurekhem
shaalu lishelom anederoniqos veyuneyas qerovay vaasher hayu asurim iti velahem shem bashelichim ulefanay hayu vamashicha
shaalu lishelom amepelias chavivi baadoneynu
shaalu lishelom urevanos chaverenu ba'avodat hamashicha velishelom isetakis chavivi
shaalu lishelom apalis habachun bamashicha shaalu lishelom beney-veyto shel-arisetovelos
shaalu lishelom horodion qerovi shaalu lishelom beney-veyto shel-nareqisos asher-hem baadoneynu
shaalu lishelom terufeyna uterufasa ha'amelot baadoneynu shaalu lishelom paresis hachaviva she'amela 'amal rav baadoneynu
shaalu lishelom rufos hanivechar baadoneynu velishelom imo shehi keem li
shaalu lishelom asuneqeritos ufeleygon veheremas ufaterovas veheremis vehaachim asher itam
shaalu lishelom pilologos veyuleya nirevas vaachoto veolumepas vekhal-haqedoshim asher itam
shaalu ish lere'ehu leshalom baneshiqa haqedosha qehilot hamashicha shoalot lishelomekhem
vaani mazehir etekhem achay lasum peneykhem bimeshalechey medanim umikhesholim shel khaleqach asher lemadetem vesuru mehem
ki anashim kaele eynam 'ovedim et-adoneynu yeshu'a hamashicha ki im-et-keresam uveimerey no'am usefat chalaqot yate'u et-lev hapetaim
ki mishema'etekhem noda'at lakol lakhen ani samecha 'aleykhem aval retsoni shetiheyu chakhamim lehetiv utemimim levileti hare'a
velohey hashalom hu yedake et-hasatan bimehera tachat rageleykhem chesed adoneynu yeshu'a hamashicha 'imakhem
timotios chaveri veluqeyos veyason vesosepateros qerovay shoalim lishelomekhem
ani taretios hakotev et-haigeret hazot shoel lishelomekhem baadoneynu
gayos hamearecha oti veet kal-haqehila shoel lishelomekhem arasetos sokhen ha'ir uqevaretos achinu shoalim lishelomekhem
chesed adoneynu yeshu'a hamashicha 'im-kulekhem amen
vaasher yakhol lechazeq etekhem kivesorati vekhiqeriat yeshu'a hamashicha kefi giluy hasod asher-haya mekhuse mimot 'olam
ve'ata niteparesem venoda' 'al-yedey kitevey haneviim kemitsevat elohey 'olam lekhal hagoyim lahaviam lemishema'at haemuna
haelohim hechakham haechad lo hakavod beyeshu'a hamashicha le'olamim amen ﻿
